name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic By The Way Boston Mini Bag, imported leather material, featuring embossed FENDI ROMA lettering and a hard organic glass handle with a tortoiseshell effect. Zipper closure. Lined interior with pockets and gold metal hardware. This bag comes with a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Model: FD8067, Size: 17*18*8cm
